name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve MPAGE
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Load package: `library(MPAGE)`
2. Run function: `plot_modification_volcano(...)`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (error message, incorrect output, etc.)

## Example Code
```r
# Minimal reproducible example
library(MPAGE)
# Your code here
```

## Output
```
Paste error message or unexpected output here
```

## Environment
- R version: [e.g., 4.3.0]
- MPAGE version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, macOS 14]
- RStudio version (if applicable): [e.g., 2023.06.0]

## Input Data
If applicable, please provide:
- Structure of your input data: `str(your_data)`
- First few rows: `head(your_data)`

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Possible Solution (Optional)
If you have suggestions on how to fix the issue, please describe them here.
